"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "As an electrician living in Philadelphia, I've seen the impact of fake news on my friends and family. It's important to know how to identify and deal with false information on social media platforms like Facebook and Twitter. Here are some steps you can take to manage and deal with fake content on social media: 1) Be cautious when sharing links or posts from unverified sources, especially those that elicit strong emotions such as outrage or panic. 2) Verify the accuracy of information by checking reputable news sources or fact-checking websites. 3) If you find false information on your social media feed, report it to the platform or the person who posted it. 4) Use social media platforms with built-in fact-checking tools such as Facebook's "

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As an electrician living in Philadelphia, I've seen the impact of fake news on my friends and family. It's important to know how to identify and deal with false information on social media platforms like Facebook and Twitter. Here are some steps you can take to manage and deal with fake content on social media: 1) Be cautious when sharing links or posts from unverified sources, especially those that elicit strong emotions such as outrage or panic. 2) Verify the accuracy of information by checking reputable news sources or fact-checking websites. 3) If you find false information on your social media feed, report it to the platform or the person who posted it. 4) Use social media platforms with built-in fact-checking tools such as Facebook's
